title: Hydra setup completion fingerprint
description: Written by scripts/hydra-setup.sh (ticket #152) after the first-run wizard succeeds. Presence + shape indicate the operator completed setup; version records the launcher marker at the time of setup so upgrades can detect drift. See docs/specs/2026-04-17-setup-wizard.md.

version.description: 8-hex launcher marker from scripts/launcher-marker.sh compute hydra. Pins setup-complete to a specific launcher contract; drift indicates the operator upgraded hydra and setup may benefit from re-run.

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of setup completion. Z suffix only (no offsets), matching the rest of Hydra's timestamp convention.

mode.description: How setup was executed. interactive = the wizard prompted; non-interactive = --non-interactive flag or closed stdin. Useful for logs and for Commander to decide whether to print interactive-only hints.
